heading: Duty to maintain corporate and tax-exempt status
label: 21008 Duty to maintain corporate and tax-exempt status
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)21008(a)36 App.:5908(e)., , §§ 8(e), 14 (related to duty to maintain status), , 1532.Aug. 13, 1998Pub. L. 105–231112 Stat. 153121008(b)36 App.:5913 (related to duty to maintain status).In subsection (a), the words “organized and” are omitted as unnecessary.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)21008(a)36 App.:5908(e)., , §§ 8(e), 14 (related to duty to maintain status), , 1532.Aug. 13, 1998Pub. L. 105–231112 Stat. 153121008(b)36 App.:5913 (related to duty to maintain status).In subsection (a), the words “organized and” are omitted as unnecessary.

children.heading: .—Corporate Status
children.label: a .—Corporate Status
children.text: The corporation shall maintain its status as a corporation incorporated under the laws of Texas.

children.heading: .—Tax-Exempt Status
children.label: b .—Tax-Exempt Status
children.text: The corporation shall maintain its status as an organization exempt from taxation under the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 ( et seq.).26 U.S.C. 1
